scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-SVC fully delivered: 10-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review landed in service.md (192 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-3 four_causes→vienna_circle historical-MED with NEW compound-defect shape; E-10 set→axiom defensible-MED with NEW math-cluster-root-as-prereq shape) get fortified at the closeout. One in-band recovery: stray macOS-Finder-style duplicate file engine/session/current 2.json (orphaned from S-0108) discovered at eager-claim — moved to /tmp/ to unblock routine_lifecycle_push.py eager-claim (which correctly refused the unclean tree). Filed Issue #57 for downstream investigation.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0116 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-SVC landed a 10-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic + S-0112 language + S-0113 science + S-0114 political + S-0115 aesthetics precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/service.md (192 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 7 sound (6 sound-high + 1 sound-medium E-6 bivalence_principle→validity_logical), 1 defensible-medium (E-10 set_mathematical→axiom_mathematical — NEW math-cluster-root-as-prereq shape: structurally analogous to discipline-label-foundation-spine pattern at S-0112/S-0113/S-0114/S-0115 but at a different LEVEL because set is a mathematical primitive rather than a discipline-label; the literal-flag criterion of the per-node prompt template does not fire on N-8 set_mathematical which is appropriately concept-level; cluster-root-as-prereq shape generalizes the discipline-label-foundation-spine shape; closeout may extend pre-listed `discipline_label_node_at_root` soft-warn proposal #2 to a broader `cluster_root_node_as_prereq` shape capturing both variants under a single soft-warn), 2 historical-not-pedagogical (E-2 presocratic_naturalism→aristotelian_four_causes high-confidence within-history-cluster developmental sequence — Aristotle was historically influenced by Presocratics but the four-cause analysis is genuinely new conceptual machinery and the relation is influence not prereq; E-3 aristotelian_four_causes→vienna_circle_logical_positivism medium-confidence cross-cluster history bridge with NEW compound-defect shape — historical-not-pedagogical AND long-distance-shortcut co-located on a single cross-cluster history bridge, distinct in shape from prior single-defect reversal/defensibility patterns S-0112 tools-vs-position / S-0114 question-vs-answer / S-0105 frameworks-vs-motivations / S-0108 position-vs-criterion / S-0110 argument-vs-position / S-0112-S-0113 developmental-arc / S-0115 cross-cluster-theoretical-thread-ordering; primary verdict recorded as historical because retyping to `historical_influence` resolves both axes simultaneously; the more-proximate scholasticism→renaissance_mechanism→vienna_circle developmental chain is in the graph). Node-verdict tally: 7 sound-high + 1 granularity-mismatch-high (N-4 aristotelian_four_causes — FIRST UNAMBIGUOUS LITERAL-FLAG GRANULARITY-MISMATCH in the routine block; the per-node prompt template literally cites "Aristotelian Four Causes" as the named example of a thinker-framework name to flag; substantive disposition question is broader than single N-4 because ALL SEVEN history-terminator nodes are doctrine/movement/thinker-framework labels at the same granularity level — presocratic_naturalism, greek_atomism, aristotelian_four_causes, scholasticism, renaissance_mechanism, vienna_circle_logical_positivism, hegelian_dialectic; closeout adjudicates whether history-terminator sub-class warrants special-case granularity allowance OR triggers structural revision). Substantive defects: 4 of 18 sampled elements (22.2%) — HIGHEST within-subdomain rate of the routine block (above S-0115 aesthetics 5.3% / S-0111 logic 5% / S-0105 epistemology 5.4% / S-0110 mind 10.8% / S-0113 science 10.5% / S-0114 political 10% / S-0109 metaphysics 14.3% / S-0108 ethics 16.7% / S-0112 language 21%; below the cross-bridge baseline 35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104). Defect concentration in the history-terminator sub-cluster matches the AUDIT-SVC task-name emphasis ("emphasis on history-terminator sub-class given S-0081 gate's historical-not-pedagogical pattern"); the formal-logic + math sub-clusters show well-calibrated foundational-systems-anchored relations (7 sound findings in those clusters alone); the high-band defect rate is concentrated in the history-terminator sub-cluster predicted by the master-plan's task-name annotation. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was below the trigger — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-5) was 2/5 = 40%; standard 35% density held (though elevated given E-2+E-3 both historical). Four pattern-aggregation surfaces strengthened for the closeout: (1) HISTORICAL_INFLUENCE PREDICATE-ACTIVATION threshold cleared with WIDE margin — the master-plan §"Structural reopen pre-flag" 10+ ADR-warranting threshold is now satisfied with 14 cross-bridges from S-0081/S-0104 + E-2 + E-3 + likely 4 unsampled within-service history edges (5 within-history-cluster + 3 cross-cluster bridges from history-terminators in 0050_seed_services_part1.sql); the within-service history pattern extends coverage from cross-bridges to within-service edges and supports the closeout's predicate-activation memo; (2) FIRST UNAMBIGUOUS LITERAL-FLAG granularity-mismatch at N-4 aristotelian_four_causes — prior routine sessions had SUB-discipline label granularity-mismatches with substantive content (S-0105 N-8 bayesian_epistemology, S-0108 N-4 moral_epistemology, S-0108 N-9 animal_ethics, S-0109 N-4 modality, S-0109 N-6 mereology) and TOP-LEVEL discipline label granularity-mismatches (S-0113 N-5 philosophy_of_science, S-0114 N-5 political_philosophy) but no literal thinker-framework named-example until now; broader policy question for the closeout: history-terminator sub-class granularity allowance OR structural revision, interacting with the historical_influence predicate-activation question; (3) NEW compound-defect cross-cluster history bridge shape at E-3 — distinct in kind from all prior single-defect reversal/defensibility shapes; closeout adjudicates whether to record as primary-historical (the dominant defect — retyping resolves both axes) or as primary-weak (the within-`pedagogical_prerequisite`-typing reading where the more-proximate path makes the direct edge redundant); (4) NEW math-cluster-root-as-prereq shape at E-10 — generalizes the discipline-label-foundation-spine pattern to a different level. No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals + S-0104's `cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary` candidate + S-0110's argument-vs-position directionality candidate were not extended at this routine layer. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 28 within-service edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; eleventh session in a row confirming graph-wide). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-3, E-10) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. In-band recovery: stray macOS-Finder-style duplicate file engine/session/current 2.json (orphaned from S-0108 routine session — contents already preserved in engine/session/archive/S-0108.json) discovered at eager-claim; routine_lifecycle_push.py eager-claim correctly refused to push (exit 2 — bounded eager-claim-race recovery shape not met because the cause was a stale duplicate, not an eager-claim race); moved to /tmp/stale_current_S-0108_recovered.json to unblock the push; filed Issue #57 for downstream investigation (likely iCloud/Finder sync artifact — "X.json" + "X 2.json" Finder duplicate naming pattern). 0 HANDOFF entries; 1 Issue filed (#57 macOS Finder duplicate); 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0115 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-SVC criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-HT (hubs top-10 + 3 diagnostic syllabus traces gettier_problem / modal_realism / social_contract_theory; depends_on ALL subdomain audits now satisfied). After AUDIT-HT closes, T-PHASE-5-AUDIT is target-met and routines exit at step 3 thereafter; user runs interactive audit closeout.
